note: English subtitles. Same keys as dialogues.ht.json.

lignes.texte: Welcome home, my child. This neighborhood needs kind-hearted people.
Little by little, the bird builds its nest. Don't rush, but don't stop.
They're holding people in the old warehouse. Be careful, guards everywhere.
If we can reopen the school, the children will have a chance.
Franko, cover me. I'll free the hostages quietly.
